name: Chartered Accountant
education: CA Foundation, Intermediate & Final along with 2-3 years articleship training.
aiAutomationRisk: Low (Judgment, taxation planning and auditing require human compliance knowledge)
globalOpportunities: High (Recognized globally via ICAI MOUs, CPA pathways)
description: A Chartered Accountant manages financial accounts, audits, taxes, and provides strategic financial advice to businesses and individuals.

name: Financial Analyst
education: BCom, BBA Finance, CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) highly recommended.
fees: ₹4 Lakhs - ₹15 Lakhs (depending on college and CFA enrolment)
aiAutomationRisk: Medium (Data entry is automated, but strategic advisory and market interpretation remain human)
globalOpportunities: Very High (CFA is a global gold standard)
description: Financial Analysts guide businesses and individuals in making investment decisions, assessing market trends, and analyzing financial performance.

name: Investment Banker
education: MBA from Top B-School, CFA, or Bachelor's in Finance/Economics from Tier 1 College.
aiAutomationRisk: Low (High-stakes deal structuring, M&A client relationships, and negotiations cannot be automated)
description: Investment Bankers assist corporations and governments in raising capital through debt/equity, orchestrating mergers and acquisitions, and strategic restructuring.

name: Management Consultant
education: MBA, BBA, or Bachelor's in STEM/Commerce with strong problem-solving skills.
aiAutomationRisk: Low (Context-dependent strategy, organization change management, and leadership advisory)
description: Management Consultants help organizations improve their performance, solving complex operational, structural, and strategy issues.

name: Data Scientist
education: BTech/BE in CS/IT, BCA/MCA, BSc Statistics, or specialized Data Science Bootcamps.
aiAutomationRisk: Low (AI is a tool for data scientists; formulating models and business contexts needs humans)
description: Data Scientists analyze large amounts of raw data to find patterns, build predictive models, and extract insights to drive business strategy.

name: Economist
education: Bachelor's and Master's in Economics (B.A./B.Sc. & M.A./M.Sc. Economics). PhD is highly valued.
aiAutomationRisk: Low (Macroeconomic policy making and research requires human nuance and social policy contextualization)
globalOpportunities: High (World Bank, IMF, UN, Central Banks)
requiredCertifications: None strictly required; academic achievements count most
description: Economists study the production and distribution of resources, goods, and services, forecasting market trends and assisting governments and corporations with policies.

name: Entrepreneur
education: No formal degree required. BBA, MBA, or engineering can be helpful.
aiAutomationRisk: Low (Creating new businesses, vision, emotional intelligence, and risk-taking cannot be replicated by AI)
description: An Entrepreneur builds, launches, and operates a new business venture, taking on financial and strategic risks in pursuit of growth and innovation.

name: Business Analyst
education: BCom, BBA, BCA, MBA or BSc in Statistics/Computing.
aiAutomationRisk: Medium (Reporting is automated, but acting as bridge between IT and business requirements is human)
description: Business Analysts evaluate operational systems and business models, defining requirements and translating them into technical software solutions or process changes.
